message:
fix: JSONL backup spike detection too sensitive — asymmetric thresholds

The 20% spike threshold halted backups during routine bulk operations
(closing 100 orphaned wisps caused a 60% jump in scrubbed issue count).

Changes:
- Raise default threshold from 20% to 50%
- Asymmetric: increases use 2x threshold (growth is normal), drops use 1x
  (data loss is suspicious)
- Ignore changes below 20 records absolute (small DBs cause large % swings)
- Add tests for small absolute delta and asymmetric behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
